condition_notes: Nintendo's first great climb — barrels, girders, and a gorilla — licensed to Atari for the 8-bit computers (RX8031, 1983). A strong-demand cartridge among collectors. Loose, used, untested; single-owner estate.. Loose cartridge (no box/manual); Atari 8-bit COMPUTER version, NOT the 2600 cart. Used and untested — sold as-is. PHOTO SET INCOMPLETE: front label only; back/contacts, condition close-up, and a scale shot still needed.
